headline: Shares of software and AI cloud-related companies are trading lower amid possible sympathy with Oracle after the company reported Q4 financial results and announced a $40 billion financing plan for FY27. The financing needs to fund aggressive capex spending may be giving investors pause.

headline: Chips Lead Nasdaq 100 Rebound, Oracle Sinks 11%: Stock Market Today
summary: The S&P 500 gained 0.5% while the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 rose 1.1% by midday Thursday, extending a rebound from one-month lows.

headline: PTC Launches PTC Orbit, an AI-Powered As-Maintained System of Intelligence for Manufacturers
summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced the PTC Orbit™ cloud-native asset intelligence solution, which closes the gap between the product as designed and the asset as maintained. By connecting PLM, ERP, CRM, IoT, EAM, and FSM systems into a single, unified asset record, PTC Orbit applies AI to make asset information accessible, explorable, and actionable across engineering, quality, and service teams and extends the value of the Intelligent Product Lifecycle.

headline: A Look At PTC (PTC) Valuation After New AI First Product Launches
summary: Why PTC's AI push is drawing fresh attention PTC (PTC) recently rolled out new AI first products, including PTC Orbit, PTC Jetstream, and the Creo AI Assistant in its design tools, highlighting a stronger focus on AI driven product lifecycle management. For investors watching software companies tied to industrial and engineering workflows, this cluster of AI launches is important because it shows how PTC aims to embed automation and data driven decision making across its core design and...

headline: Progress Software: Deleveraging Is The Key To A Rerating
summary: Progress Software's business model relies on acquiring mature software assets, but current acquisition opportunities are less attractive. See why PRGS stock is a hold.
